title: Green Sword
description: A simple resource pack that changes the Diamond Sword texture to Vibrant Green.
body:
Change the diamond sword to make it look green, like the images![green Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e6ccf34e439dfec415d0431391a75a630619d85.png)

Keeps the original sword design, only the color is changed.

this texture pack does not need optifine.

this texture pack is compatible with all versions from 1.21 to 1.15
